name: Paddy Chayefsky
abstract: Sidney Aaron "Paddy" Chayefsky (; January 29, 1923 – August 1, 1981) was an American playwright and screenwriter. He is the only person to have won three solo Academy Awards for writing both Adapted and Original screenplays.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Sauter
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...It was written by Paddy Chayevsky. [INTERVIEWEE] Oh yeah, I remember that. I didn't see it, I remember it.
